title: 2Tm2,3
summary: 2Tm2,3 (nicknamed Tymoteusz) is a Polish Christian music band founded in 1996 by members of Polish top heavy metal and alternative music bands: Acid Drinkers, Flapjack, Armia, Houk. The name comes from 2 Timothy 2:3. The band performs a range of styles from metal to punk to reggae to indie rock.
text:
2Tm2,3 (nicknamed Tymoteusz) is a Polish Christian music band founded in 1996 by members of Polish top heavy metal and alternative music bands: Acid Drinkers, Flapjack, Armia, Houk. The name comes from 2 Timothy 2:3. The band performs a range of styles from metal to punk to reggae to indie rock.
